utterance_pair.utterance: I'm planning a trip to Cambridge and I'm interested in dining at an expensive Chinese restaurant located in the southern part of the city. I recently read about the history of the Great Fire of London in 1666 and how it led to the rebuilding of the city with improved architecture, which I find fascinating. Could you help me find such a restaurant?
Thanks! Could you please provide me with the booking reference number for Peking Restaurant? Also, I'm looking for a guesthouse in the southern area of Cambridge with free Wi-Fi for the same group.
